implementationCurrencyNote: €1,000 one-time onboarding fee as quoted on discovery call
context: US manufacturing with 90 employees across 2 plants and 3 shifts. Global operations in UK, Scotland, Ireland, England, and Germany. Opening 2 manufacturing facilities in Brazil.
priorities: Shift tracking from spreadsheets, buddy punching on manual clocks, shift premium calculations (+$0.15/hr second shift, +$0.25/hr overnight), tiered overtime, payroll spreadsheet for bookkeeper, paper-only HR documents, inclusive clock-in for flip-phone employees.
mobileStory: Tablet kiosk on plant wall for clock in/out (inclusive for flip-phone workforce). Mobile app for PTO, sick leave requests, and document signing where employees have smartphones.
operationsStory: Automated timesheets with shift premiums and overtime policies. Compensation export replaces manual spreadsheet payroll prep. Real-time visibility across 2 US sites.
documentsStory: Cloud document storage with templates, e-signatures, payslip split-by-employee upload, and audit trail — replacing 100% paper files in tornado-risk region.
payrollStory: Factorial consolidates time, absences, and shift premiums. Third-party payroll provider / bookkeeper receives compensation export or direct platform access.
implementationStory: ~45 days implementation. ~7 hours online onboarding. Target close July 2026 for September 1 fiscal year go-live.
nextSteps: Send proposal for US board and UK C-suite presentation next week. Decision within ~1 month. Full employee rollout September 1, 2026.
